title: Data Foundries and Expert Contractors
title_translation: 数据代工厂与专家外包

paragraphs.source: The reason environment tooling in general is useful is because environments are being created across many different domains: Chip design environments so models can aid in the design process, accounting ones for model to do taxes, and EHR software for medical use workflows are but few examples.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The reason environment tooling in general is useful is because environments are being created across many different domains: Chip design environments so models can aid in the design process, accounting ones for model to do taxes, and EHR software for medical use workflows are but few examples.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The reason environment tooling in general is useful is because environments are being created across many different domains: Chip design environments so models can aid in the design process, accounting ones for model to do taxes, and EHR software for medical use workflows are but few examples.

pro.text: 环境工具之所以普遍有用，是因为各类环境正在众多领域涌现：芯片设计环境能让模型辅助设计流程；会计环境用于处理税务；还有用于医疗工作流的电子健康记录(EHR)软件。这些都只是少数例子。

applied_terms: Translate 'Data foundries' as '数据工厂' or '数据代工' to reflect the industrial scale.
Ensure 'EHR software' is localized correctly as '电子健康记录(EHR)软件'.
Maintain an objective, analytical tone when discussing geopolitical VC dynamics and domestic lab compute allocation.

understanding.role_in_article: Expands the scope from coding to general domains and introduces geopolitical and market fragmentation dynamics.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Extrapolates the technical complexity of coding environments to other specialized fields like chip design and healthcare.
understanding.relation_to_next: Concludes that RL data procurement is highly fragmented (unlike the pre-training era), setting up the analysis of specific lab buying patterns.
key_points: RL environments are expanding into diverse, highly specialized domains (EHR, chip design, accounting).
Chinese VCs are heavily investing in local data foundries to serve domestic labs at lower costs.
Data procurement in the RL era is highly fragmented, diverging from the uniform data access of the pre-training era.
translation_notes: Translate 'Data foundries' as '数据工厂' or '数据代工' to reflect the industrial scale.
Ensure 'EHR software' is localized correctly as '电子健康记录(EHR)软件'.
Maintain an objective, analytical tone when discussing geopolitical VC dynamics and domestic lab compute allocation.

issues.description: 句子结构略显松散，并列项之间的逻辑层次和节奏感可以优化，以更贴近原文紧凑、举例式的分析口吻。
术语 'rubrics' 译为'评分量表'是可行的，但在AI评估领域，'评估标准'或'评分准则'可能更常用。'GDPval' 是首次出现，建议加注英文。
'we believe' 的翻译'我们相信'语气略显主观和不确定。在分析师语境中，这通常代表基于调研的判断，可选用更坚定或更符合行业报告语气的措辞。
原文是 'access to these RL environments played a huge part in increasing the capabilities for...'。译文'获取这些强化学习环境'是准确的，但'发挥了巨大作用'的表述稍显平淡，未能完全传达 'played a huge part' 所暗示的关键性、决定性作用。
段落内部逻辑衔接可以更紧密。'例如'引出的具体例子与前后句的概括性论述之间，转折略显生硬。最后一句的'当然'让步，削弱了前文论断的连贯性。
'MCP' 是首次出现且未在提供的术语表中。根据上下文（连接模型以提取信息），'MCP' 很可能指 'Model Context Protocol'（模型上下文协议），这是一种让模型与工具/数据源交互的协议。译为'模型控制协议'可能不准确。
'具有巨大的潜力' 表述稍显通用和保守。原文 'significant upside' 在商业/投资语境中更强调“上行空间”、“增值潜力”，带有更明确的机遇和回报预期。

paragraphs.source: While software engineers construct the environment itself, often the workflows are created, described, and graded by domain specific contractors involved in the environment creation process. Finance professionals help define financial tasks, doctors for medicine, lawyers for law, etc.

Finance professionals help define financial tasks, doctors for medicine, lawyers for law, etc.

Finance professionals help define financial tasks, doctors for medicine, lawyers for law, etc.

pro.text: 虽然软件工程师构建环境本身，但工作流程通常由参与环境创建过程的特定领域承包商来创建、描述和评级。金融专业人士帮助定义金融任务，医生负责医疗领域，律师负责法律领域，等等。

paragraphs.source: Labs will go through human data contractor firms, who we will touch on shortly, who are looped in for their input on specific task creation. Contracts typically last at least a quarter and can be part time or full time. Contractors design tasks, write expected solutions, specify reward signals, and in some cases, grade model solutions. These reward signals can be in the form of rubrics, the writing of which can also involve contractors, or strict verifiers. These are the sort of experts that would be contracted to help build evals like GDPval.

pro.text: 实验室会通过人类数据承包商公司（我们稍后会谈到）来运作，这些公司会参与进来，为特定任务的创建提供意见。合同通常至少持续一个季度，可以是兼职或全职。承包商负责设计任务、撰写预期解决方案、指定奖励信号，在某些情况下，还会对模型解决方案进行评级。这些奖励信号可以表现为评分准则(rubrics)，准则的撰写也可能涉及承包商或严格的验证器。这类专家正是会被聘请来帮助构建像 GDPval（一种评估基准）这类评估的。

However, we think Surge is also active internationally, selling to Chinese labs like Moonshot and Z.ai. pro.text: 这些供应商的营收主要集中于Anthropic、OpenAI和Google等西方实验室。然而，我们认为Surge在国际上也相当活跃，向月之暗面和Z.ai等中国实验室销售服务。事实上，我们认为，能否获取这些强化学习环境，是Kimi K2 Thinking和GLM-4.6能力得以大幅提升的关键因素。当公司在宣传其制作PowerPoint演示文稿或Excel表格的能力有所提升时，这直接源于额外的强化学习训练。

paragraphs.source: Chinese VC firms are actively trying to stand up Chinese data foundry competitors so they can fully serve the local ecosystem at cheaper prices than western ones. Most Chinese labs are still early to scaling RL: Qwen is currently spending around 5% of their pre-training compute on post-training. Successful homegrown data foundry business will drastically accelerate the transition, compute permitting, of course.

pro.text: 中国的风险投资机构正积极扶持本土的数据代工厂竞争者，旨在以低于西方供应商的价格，全面服务本地生态系统。目前，大多数中国实验室在扩展强化学习方面仍处于早期阶段——例如，通义千问仅将约5%的预训练算力用于后训练。若能成功培育本土数据代工厂业务，将在算力允许的前提下，极大加速整个生态向强化学习范式的转型。

paragraphs.source: Firms like Mercor are also producers of a significant amount of grading rubrics, which can be used in a variety of different domains. Currently, most rubrics are written by humans, though there are some companies, like the LLM Data Company, trying to have models write grading rubrics. This can be done through, for example, connecting performant models to highly reliable MCPs to extract information to then be used in a structured rubric.
